Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Below is the integrated event log based on the provided tables Each row represents a distinct event in the lifecycle of an order with the Case ID as order_id Events are ordered chronologically within each case using the earliest available timestamp for each activity

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order Creation is defined as the earliest order_date in the Orders table

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Items Picked events are derived from the Order Lines table Since multiple items can be picked at different times each line item generates its own event The earliest item_picking_date per order is not used to merge events instead individual item picking times are preserved to reflect real process timing

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order Dispatched is taken from the delivery_dispatch_date in the Delivery table If an order has multiple deliveries eg 1002 each dispatch is treated as a separate event

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order Arrived uses delivery_arrival_date For orders with multiple deliveries each arrival is a separate event

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Invoice Issued uses invoice_issue_date Multiple invoices per order eg 1002 are treated as separate events

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Payment Received uses payment_date Payments are linked to invoices via invoice_id If an invoice has multiple payments each is a separate event

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Resource Assignment Sales Person Assigned via sales_person_id linked to Resources table Warehouse Staff Assigned via picker_id linked to Resources table Carrier Assigned via carrier_id linked to Resources table Billing Clerk Assigned via billing_person_id linked to Resources table When multiple roles apply the most relevant eg warehouse staff for picking is used

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Events are ordered by timestamp within each case

Name: Abductive Reasoning - NE
Text: For 1004 the dispatch date 2024 01 06 is earlier than the item picking date 2024 01 06T08 00 00Z which may suggest a data inconsistency However since the delivery dispatch is recorded earlier we retain it as is assuming the system may have pre dated the dispatch before items were picked eg partial shipment planning

Name: Deductive Reasoning - NE
Text: 1004 Order Dispatched 2024 01 06T07 30 00Z AirExpress CR 03 Note Dispatch date precedes pickup possible data anomaly

Name: Deductive Reasoning - NE
Text: 1004 Order Arrived 2024 01 07T20 00 00Z AirExpress CR 03 Assumed arrival after dispatch

Name: Deductive Reasoning - NE
Text: 1004 Invoice Issued 2024 01 09T08 00 00Z Gina Carter BL 001 Amount 150 00

Name: Deductive Reasoning - NE
Text: 1004 Payment Received 2024 01 11T10 30 00Z Charlie Kim SP 003 Payment method Credit Card

Name: Deductive Reasoning - NE
Text: 1003 Payment Received 2024 01 15T09 00 00Z Bob Smith SP 002 Payment method Check

Name: Deductive Reasoning - NE
Text: 1002 Payment Received 2024 01 12T14 00 00Z Bob Smith SP 002 Payment method Wire Transfer

Name: Deductive Reasoning - NE
Text: 1001 Payment Received 2024 01 10T11 30 00Z Alice Brown SP 001 Payment method Credit Card

Name: Deductive Reasoning - NE
Text: 1005 Payment Received 2024 01 15T12 00 00Z Alice Brown SP 001 Payment method Credit Card

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Missing Events No Order Cancelled or Order Rejected events are present as no such data exists Process ends after payment
